body.title: Granny tests: mock _cc0_available to prevent live tmux dispatch
body.result: autouse fixtures in test_granny_daemon.py + test_feeds_mcp_tools.py; dedup test updated for |= semantics; 144 Granny tests pass (24411898)
body.description:
When Nanny runs pytest nightly (or any run when CC is idle), _cc0_available() reads granny.yaml + semaphore files and returns True. Tests calling run_once() without mocking this sent /sprint-ticket T-ok and /sprint-ticket T-bad to the live claude-main tmux session.

**Affected files:** tests/test_granny_daemon.py, tests/test_feeds_mcp_tools.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; test isolation
**Scope boundary:** autouse fixture that mocks _cc0_available + _dicksimnel_available to False; also update test_dedup_blocks_immediate_re_dispatch to reflect |= semantics (not = reset).
**Completion criteria:** 144 Granny tests pass; _cc0_available is never called with real config during test runs
